task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS home dashboard or patient search screen is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the chart for patient Larissa Kuhic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart for 'Larissa Kuhic' (DOB: 10 Sep 1994) is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to record vitals for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Record Vitals' form, 'Vitals' tab, or equivalent data entry screen is open within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Weight, Height, and Temperature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values 76.5 (Weight), 163 (Height), and 37.1 (Temperature) are typed into their respective input fields on the vitals form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct Pulse, Blood Pressure, and Oxygen Saturation (SpO2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values 68 (Pulse), 119 (Systolic BP), 81 (Diastolic BP), and 98 (SpO2/Oxygen Saturation) are typed into their respective input fields on the vitals form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved or submitted the recorded vitals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success/confirmation message is visible, or the newly entered vitals appear in the patient's recent observations, visit summary, or vitals history.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the OpenMRS SPA, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually typed the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is seen entered into the actual OpenMRS input fields, not just written in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the vitals were entered for the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Larissa Kuhic' is clearly visible on the same screen where the vitals are being entered or saved, ensuring the data wasn't added to the wrong patient.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Larissa Kuhic (DOB: 1994-09-10). Expected vitals to be recorded: Weight: 76.5 kg, Height: 163 cm, Temperature: 37.1 °C, Pulse: 68 bpm, Systolic BP: 119, Diastolic BP: 81, SpO2: 98%.
